channel.title: NYC Open Data — Procurement & Contracts (recently updated)

item.title: Public Restrooms
item.description: Category: Procurement & Contracts. Agency: Department of Parks and Recreation (DPR), Department of Transportation (DOT), Department of City Planning (DCP), Department of Citywide Administrative Services (DCAS), Mayor's Office of Operations (Ops), New York Public Library (NYPL), Brooklyn Public Library (BPL), Queens Public Library (QPL), Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA). Updated: 2025-06-27.

item.title: Public Restrooms (Operational)
item.description: Category: Procurement & Contracts. Agency: Department of Parks and Recreation (DPR), Department of Transportation (DOT), Department of City Planning (DCP), Department of Citywide Administrative Services (DCAS), Mayor's Office of Operations (Ops), New York Public Library (NYPL), Brooklyn Public Library (BPL), Queens Public Library (QPL), Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA). Updated: 2025-06-27.
